claim_normalized: What will be extraordinary, however, will be revealed on the 13th of February, when the Australian Prime Minister, Kevin Rudd, will officially apologise to the Aboriginal people for the humiliating and degrading things that have been done to them over two centuries by the English immigrants and Europeans who have settled in Australia.
